name: Honcho
description: User state management platform for AI apps. Stores user context, preferences, and interaction history to enable personalized multi-session AI experiences.

skills.name: Track evolving user preferences learned from interaction history

skills.name: Share user context across multiple AI applications from one platform

skills.name: Link user identity across sessions and devices for unified personalization

skills.name: Store arbitrary personalization metadata alongside structured session records
